Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels

Durable BOPP Labels for Food, Beverage & Beauty Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material: White BOPP (Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene) Finish: Gloss or Matte Lamination Adhesive: Permanent, Waterproof Shapes: Circle, Square, Rectangle, Oval Delivery: Roll Format with Kiss-Cut Application Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium White Waterproof Roll Labels for Professional Packaging

Transform your product packaging with custom white waterproof roll labels engineered for durability and visual impact. Made from premium BOPP (biaxially oriented polypropylene) material, these labels deliver exceptional resistance to water, oils, and food acids while maintaining vibrant print quality that lasts. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Perfect for food jars, beverage bottles, cosmetics, and beauty products, our white waterproof roll labels provide an opaque background that makes bold, colorful designs pop. The kiss-cut format ensures easy peeling and application, while professional lamination options create a high-end finish that elevates your brand presentation.

Available in multiple shapes including circle, square, rectangle, and oval configurations, these labels accommodate diverse packaging requirements. Whether you're launching a boutique brand or managing large-scale production, our custom water bottle labels and roll label solutions scale to meet your exact specifications.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Waterproof Roll Labels Order Process

Ordering custom white waterproof roll labels is streamlined through our professional design and approval system. Start by selecting your label dimensions, shape, and finish options using our online configurator, then upload your artwork or work with our in-house design team to create professional packaging graphics.

Design Process

Upload your artwork files or utilize our design services to create custom white waterproof roll labels that align with your brand standards. Our graphic design team reviews all submissions to ensure optimal print quality and provides recommendations for color accuracy and layout optimization on BOPP material.

Payment

Secure payment processing accepts all major credit cards, PayPal, and business accounts. Orders require payment approval before entering production, and we provide detailed invoicing for business customers managing multiple label projects or recurring orders.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your white waterproof roll labels production status through our proprietary tracking system. Receive real-time updates from artwork approval through printing, finishing, and shipping preparation, ensuring complete visibility throughout the manufacturing process.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for White Waterproof Roll Labels

White waterproof roll labels production begins after artwork approval and payment confirmation. Our manufacturing timeline accounts for BOPP material preparation, digital printing, lamination application, and precision kiss-cutting to ensure consistent quality across your entire roll order.

Standard Production

Standard white waterproof roll labels ship within 3 business days after artwork approval. This timeline includes material preparation, printing, lamination, cutting, and quality inspection to ensure your labels meet professional packaging standards.

Rush Production Options

Expedited production available for urgent white waterproof roll labels orders. Rush options reduce standard turnaround while maintaining quality control processes essential for waterproof BOPP material handling and precision cutting applications.

Production time begins after artwork approval and does not include shipping transit. Proof approval timing directly impacts your final delivery date, so prompt feedback expedites the entire process.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for White Waterproof Roll Labels

White waterproof roll labels utilize kiss-cut technology optimized for BOPP material characteristics. This cutting method preserves the backing liner while cutting through the label material, enabling easy peeling and application for efficient packaging operations.

Kiss-Cut White Waterproof Roll Labels

Kiss-cutting cuts through the white BOPP label material while leaving the backing liner intact. This method creates individual labels that remain on the roll for easy dispensing and application. The backing liner provides stability during storage and transportation while enabling smooth label removal during application.

Shape Options

Available shapes include circle, square, rectangle, and oval configurations. Each shape option accommodates different packaging designs and branding requirements while maintaining the waterproof properties essential for food, beverage, and cosmetic applications.

Roll configuration options include custom quantities per roll and rewind direction specifications to match your labeling equipment requirements and application workflow preferences.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for White Waterproof Roll Labels

White waterproof roll labels require high-resolution artwork optimized for BOPP material printing characteristics. Proper file preparation ensures vibrant color reproduction and sharp detail resolution that takes advantage of the smooth, printable surface of white BOPP substrate.

Preferred File Types

Vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) provide optimal results for white waterproof roll labels printing. Vector artwork scales perfectly to any label size while maintaining crisp edges and consistent color reproduction essential for professional packaging applications.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files (PNG, TIFF, PSD) work well for photographic elements or complex graphics. Minimum 300 DPI resolution at final print size ensures sharp reproduction on white BOPP material surface.

File Setup Guidelines

Include bleed areas extending 0.125" beyond your final label dimensions to account for cutting tolerances. Convert all text to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues. Use CMYK color mode for accurate color matching on white waterproof roll labels.

Our design team reviews all artwork submissions and provides feedback for optimal print quality on BOPP material, including color adjustment recommendations and layout optimization for custom clear roll labels and white roll label applications.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Waterproof Roll Labels Shipping Information

White waterproof roll labels ship via professional packaging designed to protect BOPP material integrity during transit. Roll packaging prevents crushing and maintains label adhesive properties while ensuring your labels arrive ready for immediate application.

Shipping Methods

Standard shipping via UPS Ground provides reliable delivery for most white waterproof roll labels orders. Expedited shipping options include UPS 2-Day and Overnight services for urgent packaging projects requiring fast turnaround.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time is separate from production time and varies by destination. Standard ground shipping typically requires 3-5 business days within the continental United States, while expedited options reduce transit time to 1-2 business days.

Important Shipping Notes

White waterproof roll labels ship from our Minnesota facility and include tracking information for all orders. Large quantity orders may require freight shipping to ensure safe delivery and proper handling of bulk roll packaging.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installing White Waterproof Roll Labels

Proper application of white waterproof roll labels ensures maximum adhesion and longevity on your packaging. BOPP material characteristics require specific application techniques to achieve optimal results and maintain waterproof properties throughout product use.

Surface Preparation

Clean application surfaces with isopropyl alcohol to remove oils, dust, and residue that could interfere with adhesive bonding. Allow surfaces to dry completely before applying white waterproof roll labels to ensure maximum adhesion strength.

Label Application

Remove labels from the backing liner and apply with firm, even pressure starting from one edge and working across the entire label surface. The permanent adhesive on white waterproof roll labels creates an immediate bond that strengthens over time.

Application Tips

Apply white waterproof roll labels at room temperature for optimal adhesive performance. Avoid stretching BOPP material during application, as this can affect final appearance and adhesion quality. For curved surfaces, work out air bubbles using a squeegee or application tool.

These installation techniques also apply to custom water bottle labels and other BOPP-based label applications requiring waterproof durability.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are White Waterproof Roll Labels?

White waterproof roll labels are professional packaging labels made from BOPP (biaxially oriented polypropylene) material that provides superior resistance to water, oils, and chemicals. These labels feature a white, opaque surface ideal for vibrant color printing and are delivered in roll format with kiss-cut application for easy dispensing. Common applications include food packaging, beverage bottles, cosmetic containers, and household products where moisture resistance and durability are essential.

Design Your Custom White Waterproof Roll Labels Today

Ready to elevate your product packaging with professional white waterproof roll labels? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to create custom labels that protect your brand while delivering the durability your products demand. From initial design consultation through final delivery, our team ensures your white waterproof roll labels meet exact specifications and exceed quality expectations.

Choose from multiple finishing options including gloss and matte lamination to create the perfect look for your brand. Whether you need labels for boutique products or large-scale manufacturing, our flexible production capabilities accommodate orders of any size while maintaining consistent quality and competitive pricing.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

White Waterproof Roll Labels FAQs

How long do white waterproof roll labels last on products?

White waterproof roll labels made from BOPP material typically last 2-5 years depending on storage conditions and exposure. The waterproof properties and chemical resistance of BOPP ensure labels maintain adhesion and print quality throughout normal product lifecycles, making them ideal for food, beverage, and cosmetic packaging applications.

What surfaces work best with white waterproof roll labels?

White waterproof roll labels adhere excellently to smooth, non-porous surfaces including glass, plastic, metal, and coated paperboard. Clean, dry surfaces provide optimal adhesion for the permanent adhesive used on BOPP material, ensuring long-lasting application on bottles, jars, containers, and packaging materials.

Can white waterproof roll labels withstand refrigeration and freezing?

Yes, white waterproof roll labels perform well in refrigerated and freezer environments. BOPP material maintains flexibility and adhesion at low temperatures while the waterproof coating prevents moisture damage from condensation, making these labels perfect for frozen foods, refrigerated beverages, and cold storage applications.

What file format works best for white waterproof roll labels artwork?

Vector files in AI, EPS, or PDF format provide the best results for white waterproof roll labels. Vector artwork ensures crisp edges and scalability while maintaining color accuracy on the white BOPP surface. High-resolution raster files (300+ DPI) also work well for photographic elements or complex designs.

How are white waterproof roll labels different from regular paper labels?

White waterproof roll labels use synthetic BOPP material instead of paper, providing superior water resistance, chemical resistance, and durability. Unlike paper labels that can dissolve or deteriorate when wet, BOPP labels maintain integrity and adhesion in moisture-rich environments, making them essential for products requiring long-term durability.

What lamination options are available for white waterproof roll labels?

White waterproof roll labels offer both gloss and matte lamination finishes. Gloss lamination provides vibrant color enhancement and high-shine appearance, while matte lamination creates a sophisticated, non-reflective surface that resists fingerprints and accepts handwritten information when needed.
